name: HWR_ACCOMPLISH_B
description: The accomplishment table stores profile accomplishment data.

columns.Name: ACCOMPLISHMENT_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the accomplishment table.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: The source Id for the profile which has the accomplishment.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: This is the description of the accomplishment

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: This is the user comment for the accomplishment.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the start date of the accomplishment.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the end date of the accomplishment.

columns.Name: COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the completion date of the accomplishment.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
